about.title: About Far East Property Management
about.description: We are Suriname's trusted real estate agency, specializing in residential, commercial, and investment properties.
about.missionText: To provide exceptional real estate services to buyers, sellers, tenants, and investors across Suriname.
about.whyPoint1: Deep local knowledge of the Suriname property market
about.whyPoint4: Full-service support from search to signing

buying.title: Buying Property in Suriname
buying.description: Let us guide you through every step of purchasing property in Suriname.
buying.step1Text: Explore our curated selection of properties for sale.
buying.step2Text: Our agents will arrange viewings at your convenience.
buying.step3Text: We negotiate on your behalf to get the best price.
buying.step4Text: We handle the paperwork to complete your purchase.

selling.title: Sell Your Property with Far East
selling.description: Get the best value for your property with our experienced team.
selling.valuationText: Get a professional valuation of your property at no cost.
selling.marketingText: Your property will be featured on our website and across Suriname.
selling.negotiationText: Our agents handle all negotiations to maximize your return.

renting.title: Renting in Suriname
renting.description: Find the perfect rental property for your needs and budget.
renting.tenantServicesText: We assist tenants throughout their entire rental journey.

expat.title: Expat Services
expat.description: Relocating to Suriname? We specialize in helping expats find their perfect home.
expat.relocationText: We guide you through every step of your move to Suriname.
expat.neighborhoodsText: Discover the best areas for expats in Paramaribo and beyond.
expat.communityText: Connect with other expats and build your network in Suriname.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We are here to help. Reach out to our team for any inquiries.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

account.description: Manage your profile and saved searches.
